  "findings": [
    "Missing load reactor on long motor leads",
    "Risk of reflected wave phenomenon (dv/dt) causing motor insulation breakdown"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an output load reactor or dV/dt filter between the VFD and the motor as specified by the manufacturer's installation manual for long cable runs"
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a VFD with long motor leads without a load reactor or dV/dt filter can lead to high voltage spikes at the motor terminals due to reflected wave phenomenon, risking premature motor insulation failure and violating manufacturer installation requirements.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430",
    "Manufacturer VFD Installation Manuals"
  ]
}
